title: FuturesElite Check website

firm_rules.weekend_holding: Not allowed. All trades must be closed by 4:59 PM EST daily.

seo_content:
FuturesElite Technical Infrastructure

FuturesElite, based in Italy and established in November 2024, is a futures proprietary trading firm offering Instant and 1-Step program types across three tiers: Prime, Elite, and Custom variants. Account sizes range from $50,000 to $150,000. Five platforms are supported: Quantower, Volumetrica Trading, ATAS Orderflow Trading, Deepmap, and Deepcharts. No coupon code is currently published; the firm lists discounted pricing directly on its website.

The Instant program covers three account sizes: $50,000 at $249.50 (original $499.00), $100,000 at $349.50 (original $699.00), and $150,000 at $449.50 (original $899.00). The Elite 1-step program spans three sizes: $50,000 at $64.50 (original $129.00), $100,000 at $114.50 (original $229.00), and $150,000 at $164.50 (original $329.00). The 1-Step Custom account at $150,000 is also listed at $164.50 (original $329.00). The Prime 1-step is available at $50,000 for $24.50 (original $49.00), $100,000 for $39.50 (original $79.00), and $150,000 for $54.50 (original $109.00). Payments are accepted via Credit/Debit Card, Crypto, and Revolut Pay.

Five platforms are supported: Quantower, Volumetrica Trading, ATAS Orderflow Trading, Deepmap, and Deepcharts. All instruments traded are futures-based; no specific leverage data is published. News trading restrictions apply on funded and Instant accounts: all positions must be closed 2 minutes before and after Tier 1 news events, creating a total 6-minute restricted window. A customizable news add-on is available. All trades must be closed by 4:59 PM EST daily; overnight and weekend holding is not permitted.

All programs carry a 95% profit split. On Live accounts, the first $10,000 of profit is paid at 100%. Instant accounts require 7 winning days with minimum daily PnL milestones ranging from $100 to $350 before a payout can be requested. Prime and Elite accounts require 5 winning days with profit goals of $2,000 to $4,500, and per-payout caps apply between $1,300 and $5,000. There is no minimum payout for Riseworks; Crypto payouts have a $500 minimum. Payout methods are Crypto and Riseworks. The inactivity threshold is 29 days for standard accounts and 7 days for Instant accounts.

FuturesElite prohibits straddle and strangle strategies used to exploit news volatility, aggressive account rolling through repeated challenge purchases, and hedging or reverse trading across different user accounts. Placing multiple limit orders at the same price for market manipulation is banned. The CME Group 2% Price Limit Rule applies to all accounts. Dollar-cost averaging is allowed but may not be used as the primary trading strategy. Copy trading between the trader's own accounts is permitted; copying from other traders is prohibited. Fully automated AI trading bots are not permitted.
